page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6t.xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor operating at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance provides 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

This instance features 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and 1:2 CPU-to-memory ratio make this instance suitable for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. It is designed for applications such as web serving, batch processing, and lightweight computational tasks where consistent CPU performance is prioritized over high memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6t.xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized virtual machine running on the KVM hypervisor. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 2.5 GHz, it delivers 4 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores with a single thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio tailored for compute-heavy tasks. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, contains no local storage, and does not include GPU acceleration. This hardware profile offers a cost-effective solution for workloads requiring dedicated, predictable CPU performance without the overhead of large memory allocations. It is suited for web serving, batch processing, and distributed compute nodes.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6t.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized virtual server featuring a balanced 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio for predictable, single-threaded processor performance.
